name: Darrell Bobbitt
bio: Darrell Bobbitt serves as the Houston County Sheriff, protecting the citizens of Houston County from the historic county seat of Crockett. Sheriff Bobbitt leads a dedicated team of deputies serving one of the oldest counties in Texas.
campaignPromises: Patrol the vast rural areas of Houston County effectively
Combat illegal hunting and timber theft on private lands
Maintain the county jail within state compliance standards
Coordinate with the Davy Crockett National Forest law enforcement
Provide quick emergency response across the county
